headline: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Offering Value After Recent Gains And Modest Pullback In The Share Price
summary: If you are wondering whether Coca-Cola is fairly priced or asking too much for its brand power, you are not alone in questioning what you are really paying for with the stock today. The share price closed at US$77.88, with returns of 12.7% year to date and 12.9% over the past year. The last 7 and 30 days show modest declines of 1.8% and 1.5%, which may matter to short term traders. Recent headlines have continued to focus on Coca-Cola's brand strength, product portfolio and position as a...
